reviews.review_title: The game is good The game is good
reviews.review_description: I finished the game in one day amazing campaign if you’re looking to just have fun, put a lot of detail into the small things 10 out of 10 recommend for gamers for just looking to relax game can be a little scary sometimes but overall it’s really good. Highly recommend.

If you’re looking for your next meta quest adventure I can assure you this is the one to go for. At only $30 you can’t pass this one up. 

The customization in this game has got to be one of the best in VR. From changing the look of your armor with a ton of different color schemes to changing your weapon load outs, this game has it all.

I played this on the PSVR at launch and I can tell you that playing it now on the Quest3s has been a total improvement. Load times are super quick, movement is better, graphics are amazing and they even added extra suits for the Quest port.

I rate this game a 10/10 and couldn’t imagine a better Ironman game than this. Nuff Said.

This is the most craziest and most best Ironman game I have ever played.There are many stuff u can do in here such as flying and shooting your repulser, and u can even upgrade your armour,the chapters are really fun to play,this is worth it.

Hope this review helped bye

reviews.review_title: Love it but I have a suggestion
reviews.review_description: So I’ve been trying a lot to find a good Spiderman vr game for a while I haven’t tho so I have a suggestion I want a realistic where it has almost every suit you can take your mask off and I has the classic web shooting animation also pls bring marvel powers united to quest 3s

Listen the game isn’t bad by all means it just isn’t a game worth the price. Some of the maps feel bland and I feel like this was made for and ONLY for the PSVR1, and not the meta quest 2/3. The Tokyo map feels the most bland and honestly the game just doesn’t have ￼enough features to justify the games price, sure the game was for old vr headsets and to try to get people into vr but I feel like the quest port just isn’t good enough. All of that aside the gameplay is decent and worth checking out but I would definitely recommend to please wait until it goes on sale.
The game is amazing! The controls are easy and make sense too. The story is unique and fun. The armour customization is great and a fun idea. Overall this game is so good it needs a sequel.

reviews.review_title: I have a request PLEASE READ
reviews.review_description: Ok so I love this game SO MUCH but PLEASE make it so that you can use the mark 1 PLEASEEEEEEE

I mean it’s fun in the start but there were only 10 chapters with 3 of them actually being good, and after you’ve done it it becomes incredibly boring because there isn’t a sandbox, you can just choose between flying, training or doing the chapter over. Wouldn’t necessarily recommend.

Don’t listen to the rage baiters this game is by far one of the best top tier games for VR. Although the game can be hard, but then again what game isn’t? One last thing though, for the developers, make another one of these, but about Venom, I’d KILL to see it happen!
10/10

reviews.review_title: Could be THE VR dream but stays a dream
reviews.review_description:
It could have been the best game to play in VR but there are some major flaws in the mechanics. Dodging is complicated and relying on weapons is not helpful when being attacked, the fists are the most safe option to avoid getting hit which takes away some of the magic. Although the overall gameplay is smooth, if you are playing on hard, you may struggle getting all the stars because of these imperfections.

Other than that, the visuals are ok but a MQ3 update would be nice. The opponent's beams look like a 90s game. 
The story is good and the dialogues are super funny but there are many unskippable scenes, frustrating while restarting a mission. The duration of the main missions if you don't care about the stars and the challenges is not great for the price either.
Also, the type of enemies are always the same and there are just 2-3 different places for all of the 10 stages. 

What I would like to see as well: being able to walk while in the suit and have more freedom in actions while out of the suit: switch between Stark and Ironman directly and explore, introduce an open world and some puzzles.
I’ve had this game for 2yrs and it can use a reboot it’s not the best in my opinion it’s more for those real iron man fans but if I would recommend a game I’d say rather get Deadpool

I waited a long time to purchase this game as some reviews put me off buyung. But let me be honest, I LOVED this game. It was sufficiently challenging to make me work for each level without leaving me feeling defeated. I loved getting to fly around as Iron MAN, and there were flight and combat challenges to hone your skills as you progressed through the chapters. All around great game and worth every dollar I spent (which I got in sale, so even better). I'm hoping the developers bring it a follow up, or at least another Marvel character.
